title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners:
IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners!
